title: nephrodium biforme
intro: Nephrodium biforme, also known as the two-lobed nephrodium, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to reduce pain and prevent infection. The health benefits of Nephrodium biforme include treating various ailments such as rheumatism, fever, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from skin irritations and respiratory problems. Nephrodium biforme can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
